title: AI-Powered Analytics Platform
description: Led product strategy and launch of a B2B analytics platform that uses ML to surface actionable insights from unstructured data. Grew from 0 to 500 paying customers in 18 months.

title: Growth Infrastructure Overhaul
description: Rebuilt the entire growth stack for a Series B fintech — tracking, attribution, lifecycle emails, and experimentation framework. Reduced CAC by 34% within one quarter.

title: Developer Experience Redesign
description: Owned the end-to-end redesign of a developer portal serving 20,000+ engineers. Improved time-to-first-API-call from 45 minutes to under 8.

title: Readwise Digest Bot
description: A small automation that pulls your Readwise highlights each morning and sends a curated daily digest to Telegram. Built with Python and runs serverlessly on Railway.

title: Local Eats Map
description: A crowdsourced map of independently owned restaurants in my city — no chains, no ads, no dark patterns. Built with Astro, Mapbox, and a Notion database as the CMS.
